reason: Verified that the agent can successfully use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible
Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260417-182034-wydy" agent in sidebar - Agent page loaded successfully
Step 3: Verified agent status - Status confirmed as "idle" (acceptable per requirements)
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message submitted successfully, new session created ("GitHub Identity Verification Check")
Step 5a: GitHub account access card appeared - Card displayed with GitHub account pre-selected
Step 5b: Granted GitHub account access - Clicked "Allow Access" button successfully
Step 5c: API permission request appeared - GitHub API request review dialog for "GET /user" appeared
Step 5d: Granted API permission - Clicked "Allow Once" to authorize the API call
Step 6: Waited for response - Agent completed in 14 seconds (well within 4-minute limit)
Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username - Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190" with screenshot captured
